task_completion.description: Verify that the 'sample_order_lines2023' dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Data Elements panel on the left side of the screen; 'sample_order_lines2023' should be visible as the active dataset.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Line chart visualization has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main canvas should display a line chart, and the visualization type dropdown/icon in the grammar panel should indicate 'Line'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Profit and Order Date (Quarter) are configured for the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel, 'Profit' should be placed in the Values (Y-axis) section, and 'Order Date' or 'Quarter' should be placed in the Category (X-axis) section.

task_completion.description: Verify that Product Category is set as the Trellis column dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel, 'Product Category' should be visible under the 'Trellis Columns' (or 'Columns') section, splitting the chart horizontally.

task_completion.description: Verify that Region is set as the Trellis row dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel, 'Region' should be visible under the 'Trellis Rows' (or 'Rows') section. (Note: This may be missing due to dataset limitations, score strictly on visual presence).

task_completion.description: Verify that the canvas has been renamed to 'Quarterly Profit by Region and Category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas tab (usually at the bottom of the visualization area) should be explicitly named 'Quarterly Profit by Region and Category'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is saved as 'Trellis_Profit_Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window should read 'Trellis_Profit_Analysis', or a save dialog confirming this name should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop interface with panels, menus, and canvas, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualization should be rendered within the Oracle Analytics workspace, not pasted as an image or mocked up in a different program.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the expected names into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected canvas name and project name must appear in their respective UI elements within Oracle Analytics Desktop, not in Notepad, a terminal, or a browser search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected project filename is 'Trellis_Profit_Analysis.dva'. The expected canvas name is 'Quarterly Profit by Region and Category'. The dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' is used. The chart type must be Line, with 'Product Category' as the column dimension. CRITICAL NOTE: The dataset is entirely missing the 'Region' column. The agent cannot fulfill the requirement to set Region as the row dimension. Evaluate the 'trellis_rows_configured' item strictly based on visual evidence (which will likely be missing, correctly resulting in 0 points for that specific item).
